dashboard.title: Doctor Shift Scheduling
dashboard.description: Manage medical staff schedules with automatic generation and conflict detection

grid.title: Monthly Schedule
grid.description: View and edit shifts for each doctor

grid.clearMonthConfirmDescription: This will remove all shifts for this month. This action cannot be undone.

grid.sendScheduleSkipped: {{count}} doctors without email will be skipped

config.doctorsDesc: Add doctors and assign them to teams
config.shiftSettingsDesc: Configure how many doctors are required per shift
config.maxPerShiftTooltip: Only 1 doctor from this team works per day/night shift
config.maxPerShiftError: Could not update max doctors per shift
config.deleteTeamMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? Doctors in this team will become floating staff.
config.deleteDoctorMessage: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone.

engine.normWarning: Base norm cannot be met for {{name}}.
engine.tooManyLeaveDays: Too many leave days selected. Maximum allowed: {{max}} days.

engine.overstaffedNight: {{date}}: Night shift has too many doctors ({{count}}/{{required}}).

engine.extraShiftImbalance: Extra shift imbalance: {{gap}}-shift gap between doctors.
engine.consecutiveDaysViolation: {{date}}: {{name}} has more than 3 consecutive working days
engine.nznPatternViolation: {{date}}: {{name}} has an NZN pattern (36h continuous work)
engine.forceFillTimeout: Force-fill timed out (30s) — some shifts may be understaffed

v1.headline: Monthly Shift Schedules,
v1.subheadline: Stop spending hours on Excel. Configure your teams, set the rules, and let PlanGarzi build a fair, compliant schedule automatically.

demo.gridCaption: The monthly grid view — see every doctor's shifts at a glance
demo.configCaption: Team configuration — organize doctors into teams with custom rules

features.configureTeamsDesc: Define teams, assign doctors, and set shift rules per team.
features.autoGenerateDesc: One click generates a full month respecting all constraints.
features.reviewAdjustDesc: Edit shifts, pin manual overrides, and export to PDF.

featureList.autoSchedule: Automatic schedule generation respecting rest periods
featureList.fairDistribution: Fair distribution of day, night, and 24h shifts
featureList.leaveManagement: Leave day and bridge day management
featureList.pdfExport: PDF export for printing and sharing
